Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.data.filter

Interface IObservationFieldMatcher

All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractObservationFieldMatcher, BooleanFieldMatcher, DoubleFieldMatcher, ErrorFieldMatcher, JDFieldMatcher, MagnitudeFieldMatcher, ObjectNameFieldMatcher, ObsCodeFieldMatcher, PhaseFieldMatcher, SeriesTypeFieldMatcher, StringFieldMatcher, TransformedFieldMatcher
public interface IObservationFieldMatcher
The interface for all observation field matchers.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    IObservationFieldMatcher
    create(String fieldValue, ObservationMatcherOp op)
    Creates and returns an instance of an observation matcher for the current field matcher type.

    Return a default test value for this matcher, or null if there isn't one.
    String

    The display name for this matcher.
    ObservationMatcherOp[]

    An array of operations supported by this matcher.

    Return a parsable description of this matcher; defaults to the empty string.

    What is the type of the field to be matched against?
    boolean

    Does the specified observation match a test value?
    void
    setSelectedObservationMessage(ObservationSelectionMessage msg)
    Set the observation selection message for concrete field matchers that may require additional context re: the origin of the selected observation, if any.

  • Method Details

    • create

      IObservationFieldMatcher create(String fieldValue, ObservationMatcherOp op)
      Creates and returns an instance of an observation matcher for the current field matcher type. The returned matcher contains a value-to-be-matched against the expected type given the supplied string field value. If the latter cannot be converted to the expected type, null is returned. The match operator to be used is also included in the returned object.
      Parameters:
      fieldValue - The string field value to be converted to a match object.
      op - The match operator to be used.
      Returns:
      The created matcher or null if the field value does not conform to the type required by the matcher.

    • matches

      boolean matches(ValidObservation ob)
      Does the specified observation match a test value?
      Parameters:
      ob - The observation under test.
      Returns:
      True or false.

    • getDisplayName

      String getDisplayName()
      The display name for this matcher.

    • getMatcherOps

      ObservationMatcherOp[] getMatcherOps()
      An array of operations supported by this matcher.

    • getType

      Class<?> getType()
      What is the type of the field to be matched against?
      Returns:
      A class representing a type.

    • getDefaultTestValue

      String getDefaultTestValue()
      Return a default test value for this matcher, or null if there isn't one. TODO: this should return a T! All the more reason this interface should be replaced by AbstractObservationFieldMatcher, or this interface or method parameterised with T.
      Returns:
      The default test value, or null.

    • getTestValueFromObservation

      String getTestValueFromObservation(ValidObservation ob)
      Return a test value for this matcher given an observation.
      Parameters:
      ob - The observation from which to extract the test value.
      Returns:
      The test value.

    • setSelectedObservationMessage

      void setSelectedObservationMessage(ObservationSelectionMessage msg)
      Set the observation selection message for concrete field matchers that may require additional context re: the origin of the selected observation, if any.
      Parameters:
      msg - The observation selection message.

    • getParsableDescription

      String getParsableDescription()
      Return a parsable description of this matcher; defaults to the empty string.
      Returns:
      The description string.
